description: Marco Mahrus introduces Bridge, an API platform for payments using stablecoins, highlighting its ability to facilitate conversions between currencies and stablecoins. He discusses the projected $4 trillion in cross-border money movement on-chain this year and announces a new card feature for users to spend directly from stablecoin balances, enhancing real-world usability. The collaboration with Squad Labs is noted, along with user experience details for the Fuse Wallet.
topic_summary: Bridge API enables seamless stablecoin transactions and introduces a card for spending stablecoins directly, enhancing user experience and real-world applications [t=67:48].
